scripts.test: npm --prefix services/gateway test && npm --prefix services/identity test && npm --prefix services/users-profile test && npm --prefix services/orders test && npm --prefix services/search-index test && npm --prefix apps/web test -- --run
scripts.test:coverage: npm --prefix services/gateway run test:coverage && npm --prefix services/identity run test:coverage && npm --prefix services/users-profile run test:coverage && npm --prefix services/orders run test:coverage && npm --prefix services/search-index run test:coverage
scripts.lint: npm --prefix services/gateway run lint && npm --prefix services/identity run lint && npm --prefix services/users-profile run lint && npm --prefix services/orders run lint && npm --prefix services/search-index run lint && npm --prefix apps/web run lint
